violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a sanitizer bucket. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025
Refrigerator door gasket on low boy 5 was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026

The door to the ice machine was observed in good repair. The door was observed with rust stains, the screws connecting the door to the machine at the hinge were observed rusty and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

The outside dumpster is not covered (cover is in poor repair). Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026
The tile floor by the floor drain in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. At time of inspection no persons had Food Safety Manager Training. At time of inspection no person was registered to address as a registered Food Safety Manager with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the low boy by the drive through window. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025
The grout by the drain in the back area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
